dashboard.refer_desc: Share CitizenMate and get 7 days of Premium free!
dashboard.set_date_prompt: Set your test date for a personalised study plan

onboarding.description: Let's get started by setting your goal test date. This helps us tailor your study plan.
onboarding.dont_know_date: I don't know my test date yet

upgrade.title: Unlock Your Full Potential
upgrade.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your study timeline.
upgrade.pro_desc: Perfect for pacing your study over a few months.
upgrade.premium_desc: Everything you need to pass in one go. No subscriptions.

smart_practice.hero_desc: Questions are ordered based on your performance — weakest areas first. Learn smarter, not harder, mate.
smart_practice.focus_desc: Get 15 questions focused on this topic, ordered from weakest to strongest.
smart_practice.all_desc: Get 15 questions across all topics, ordered so you tackle your weakest areas first. Instant feedback — no timer.
smart_practice.daily_limit_reached: Daily limit reached. Upgrade for unlimited practice.
smart_practice.step_1_desc: We remember every question you've answered — right or wrong — across all practice tests and smart sessions.
smart_practice.step_2_desc: Questions you've gotten wrong come back sooner. Mastered ones fade away. Your weakest topics always come first.
smart_practice.step_3_desc: As you master a question, it appears less often — at 1 day, then 3, then a week. Just like how your brain actually learns.

practice.hero_desc: Real Australian citizenship test simulations — exactly like the real thing. Timed, scored, and instantly graded.
practice.smart_desc: AI-driven questions that adapt to your weak areas using spaced repetition.
practice.smart_premium_desc: Your AI-powered study companion. Questions adapt to your weakest areas.
practice.tip_1_desc: Find a quiet spot, set a timer, and treat each mock test like the actual exam.
practice.tip_2_desc: After each test, read the explanations — even for correct answers.
practice.tip_3_desc: Use Smart Practice to target topics where you scored below 80%.
practice.tip_4_desc: One test per day is better than five in one sitting.

results.passed_desc: Brilliant work! You're well on your way. Keep practising to stay sharp for the real test.
results.failed_desc: You've already mastered {mastered} questions. Focus on the topics below and you'll get there.
results.premium_upsell_desc: Unlock CitizenMate Pro for targeted weak-area quizzes and unlimited AI tutoring.
results.rec_values_msg: You scored {values_correct}/5 on Australian Values. All 5 must be correct to pass the real test — this is non-negotiable.
results.rec_close_msg: You need {remaining} more correct answers to pass. Focus on the topics where your accuracy is lowest below.
results.rec_weak_msg: You scored {correct}/{total} ({accuracy}%) in this area. Spend extra time reviewing these questions.
results.rec_ready_msg: Great result! You passed with {total_correct}/{total} ({percentage}%). Keep refreshing your knowledge with another test.

premium.one_time_payment: One-time payment · 60 days access · No subscription
premium.sprint_pass_desc: Everything you need to pass in one payment. No subscriptions, no hidden fees.
premium.upgrade_prompt: Upgrade to Premium to unlock this feature.

referral.title: Help a Mate
referral.description: Share this link. When they sign up, you both get 7 days of Premium!

landing.hero_title: Pass your Australian Citizenship Test — guaranteed.
landing.hero_desc: Your mate for the journey. Study in your language. Practice with real test format questions. Know when you're ready with AI-powered analytics.
landing.features_desc: More than a quiz app — CitizenMate is your personal study partner for the Australian citizenship test.
landing.features_smart_desc: 20 questions, 45 minutes — just like the real test. Detailed explanations referencing the official Our Common Bond booklet.
landing.features_bilingual_desc: Study official content in English alongside your native language. Understand concepts deeply, then answer confidently.
landing.features_ready_desc: Track progress topic by topic. See your strengths, identify gaps, and know exactly when you're ready to sit the test.
landing.hiw_desc: From first practice to test day — CitizenMate guides you the whole way.
landing.hiw_body: Start with a diagnostic, study at your own pace with bilingual support, then take full mock tests until you're confident. No fluff — just the three steps that work.
landing.hiw_step_1_desc: Start with 10 quick questions to discover where you stand.
landing.hiw_step_2_desc: Tailored study based on your gaps, in your language.
landing.hiw_step_3_desc: Full mock tests, progress tracking, and AI explanations.
landing.cta_title: Ready to become an Australian citizen, mate?
landing.cta_desc: Start your free practice test now — no signup needed. See where you stand in 10 minutes.
landing.cta_fineprint: No credit card required. Free tier available forever.
landing.pricing_title: Start free, upgrade when you're ready
landing.pricing_desc: Most users pass within 60 days. One payment, no subscriptions, no surprises.
landing.pricing_free_desc: Try CitizenMate and see where you stand.
landing.pricing_sprint_desc: Everything you need to pass — designed for your study window.
landing.pricing_trust: One-time payment · No recurring charges · 60 days of full access
landing.footer_desc: Your mate for the citizenship test. Study in your language, practice with AI, and pass with confidence.
landing.footer_disclaimer: CitizenMate is independent from the Australian Government. Not affiliated with or endorsed by the Department of Home Affairs.
landing.footer_content_note: Content based on "Our Common Bond" booklet — March 2026 edition.
